headline: Stock Market Today, May 1: JetBlue Airways Rises on News That Spirit Airlines Bailout May Not Happen
summary: Investors weighed Spirit’s potential exit and a fresh turnaround plan against ongoing fuel price pressure today, May 1, 2026.

headline: Spirit Airlines to shut down after failing to secure $500 million lifeline
summary: Investing.com -- Spirit Airlines is preparing to cease operations after failing to secure a $500 million government lifeline, according to a report Friday from the Wall Street Journal, citing people familiar with the matter.

raw.headline: Spirit Airlines to shut down after failing to secure $500 million lifeline
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Spirit Airlines is preparing to cease operations after failing to secure a $500 million government lifeline, according to a report Friday from the Wall Street Journal, citing people familiar with the matter.

headline: JBLU Adds Asia Access Through China Airlines Loyalty Tie-Up
summary: JetBlue deepens China Airlines tie-up, enabling Asia-bound point redemption while raising fees to counter costs and boost loyalty appeal.

headline: Trump says government gave 'final' bailout proposal for Spirit Airlines as liquidation looms
summary: Talks with bondholders for a government bailout this week have not yet yielded a deal.
